atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports intermittent right groin pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the pain started after walking around the infusion room.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the pain has now become constant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient rates the pain a 4 out of 10.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies fever or chills.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies tingling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no bowel or bladder changes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states he has had intentional weight loss of 110 pounds.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the weight loss started in 2018.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is a 56-year-old female, height 5'6", weight 169 lbs, BP 115/75, HR 67.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Ankle edema is absent.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Neurological exam is normal.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are consistent with right hip degenerative joint disease.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is no evidence of acute inflammation or infection.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I have prescribed NSAIDs as needed for pain relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I have ordered a cane to offload the right hip.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I have scheduled a cortisone injection into the right hip joint today.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I have explained the risks and benefits of the injection, including needle insertion, sterile technique, and COVID precautions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I have scheduled a follow-up appointment in three months for reassessment and potential repeat injection if needed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I have provided the patient with a surgical history including a previous pcl repair, infertility surgery, and gallbladder removal.
